common.condition_behavior_description: How the temperature should match on the targeted entities.
common.trigger_behavior_description: The behavior of the targeted entities to trigger on.
common.trigger_threshold_changed_description: Which changes to trigger on and threshold values.
common.trigger_threshold_crossed_description: Which threshold crossing to trigger on and threshold values.

is_value.description: Tests the temperature of one or more entities.

above.description: Require the temperature to be above this value.
above.name: Above

below.description: Require the temperature to be below this value.
below.name: Below

unit.description: All values will be converted to this unit when evaluating the condition.
unit.name: Unit of measurement

is_value.name: Temperature value

changed.description: Triggers after one or more temperatures change.
changed.name: Temperature changed

crossed_threshold.description: Triggers after one or more temperatures cross a threshold.
crossed_threshold.name: Temperature crossed threshold
